subject: micrographs are partially missing in the denoising/ folder
body:
Dear all,
I found that not all even/odd micrographs are stored in the denoising 
folder. Specifically, I have a project with ~2,400 movies; all are in 
average/ powerspectrum/ and thumbnails/. But denoising/ only contains the 
first 130 micrographs (in both even/ and odd/). I couldn't find anything 
special about the last even/odd pair that is written out, or the next 
even/odd pair to be written out. No error message shows up as well.
I'm checking these micrographs because I noticed that (half-)tomograms 
back-projected by warp do not behave well in cryoCARE, and I'd like to 
reconstruct half tomos by Aretomo to try again. 
Any help and ideas will be greatly appreciated!

Best,
Qiuye
